titleStmt.title: SII 34.169: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 169. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock outside the west prākāra wall of the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Kulōttuṅga III, 4th year, Mithuna, Monday, Pūrvāshāḍha = A.D. 1181, May 31.

This registers a sale of land to the temple of Tirumāṇikkamalai-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār by a native of Kuḻittaṇḍalai. The sabhā of Kuḻittaṇḍalai made the land tax-free on receiving the tax capital from another person called Ārūran Kūttan alias Kīḻāṟṟūr-nāḍāḻvār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulōttuṅkacōḻa devaṟkuyāṇṭu 4 vatu mituṉa
tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūrāṭattunāḷ Irājagambhīravaḷa nāṭṭu mīkō
ṇan viḻamiyatēvannē nilavilaiāvaṇam Ina
Uṭaitirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiya nāyanāṟku mūlaviruttiyanāṉa Āticaṇḍaśva
kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivūr Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa nilattukku vatikku kiḻakku Arumoḻi
tēvavā ruṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu 1 catirattu nilam 1kāṇi m Ivvatikku kaṇṇāṟu 1 catirattu nilam kha Orumā m
Āka nilam Innilam Āṟumākkāṇiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ
ṭu naṟkācu 3 100 10 2(1/2) Ikkācu munnūṟu Orupattiraṇṭaraiyum Āvaṇakaḷiyē kāṭēṟṟi
poruḷ Aṟa koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇaṅ ceytu kuṭuttēn Ādicaṇḍe śvaradevaṟku viḻumiyatēva
nēn Inilam Āṟumākāṇikkum Ikācu munnūṟṟu Orupattiraṇṭaraiyumē vilaiyāvatākavum Itu
vēpporuḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ cilavōlaiyāvatākavum Itu vallatu vēṟu poruḷmāvaṟuti poruḷ
cilavōlai kāṭṭa kaṭavan Alātāṉākavum Ippaṭi Innila vilaikaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟakoṇṭu
viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttēn śaṇḍeśvadevaṟku kuḻittaṇṭalai Uṭaiyān viḻumiya
tēvanēn Ivai En Eḻuttu kuḻittaṇṭalaip peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyōm Inilam kha Orumā mkum
Iṟaikāvalāka ñ ceytu Āruran kūttanāṉa kīḻāṟṟūrnāṭāḻvār pakkal Iṟaikāval koṇṭa
kācu 100 Ikkācu nūṟum kaikkoṇṭu cempilum kallilum veṭṭikkuṭuttōm peruṅkuṟi
sabhaiyOm
Digital edition of SII 34.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
